education.degree: B.Tech in Computer Science (AI & Data Science)
education.institution: Graphic Era (Deemed to be University), Dehradun

projects.name: NotesHive
description: Developed an academic notes management platform for efficient study resource retrieval.
Integrated keyword-based and AI-based semantic search using Sentence Transformer models.
Implemented role-based access for teachers and students to upload, search, delete and access study material via REST APIs.

projects.name: ReadBuddy: AI Video Analyzer
description: Built a Chrome extension to assist visually impaired users in navigating web applications.
Integrated Gemini API and Hugging Face models like InstructBLIP and Pegasus.
Implemented hotkeys and TTS for accessibility.
Summarizes text, images, and video by capturing frames periodically during playback.

projects.name: Smart Emergency Assistance System
description: Developed a location-based emergency response system for quick help requests.
Implemented distance calculation algorithms to find the nearest emergency service station.
Automated SMS alerts sending user latitude and longitude to emergency centers.

projects.name: User-Level Firewall Framework
description: Implemented a firewall framework to monitor network traffic.
Developed modules for process monitoring, rule-based filtering, and connection tracking.
Built an interactive GUI with rule engine, action simulator, and event logger.
